features: LUXURY SMELLING FLORAL PERFUME with main notes of gardenia, lily, honey. Feels modern, feminine, charismatic.
WILL LAST THROUGH THE DAY. 8-10-hour lasting power.
GREAT VALUE FOR MONEY. We use standardised packaging – both the box and the bottle.
description: Product Description SANGADO GARDENIA is crafted from high-quality ingredients. Enjoy a long-lasting scent that stays with you for hours. Exceptional fragrance, at an affordable price. The perfect gift for someone special — or a new signature scent for yourself. 100% vegan and cruelty-free. Ingredients Alcohol denat.,Parfum, Aqua, Benzyl benzoate, Benzyl salicylate, Cinnamal, Cinnamyl alcohol, Farnesol, Geraniol, Isoeugenol, Linalool Directions Apply a small amount to pulse points for long-lasting wear. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
